name: SocialCast
description: Unified social media posting platform — connect accounts across 9 platforms and publish everywhere at once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api_key
credential_fields.description: SocialCast API Key (from your SocialCast dashboard under API Keys)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all connected social media accounts for the project. Optionally filter by platform or status. Accounts with status 'active' are fully configured and ready to post — do NOT suggest setup steps for active accounts. The platform_metadata field contains internal IDs used by the system (pageId, instagramAccountId, etc.) and should not be interpreted as incomplete setup.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get details of a specific connected social media account by ID.

tools.name: connect_account
tools.description: Initiate connecting a new social media account via OAuth. Returns an auth_url to redirect the user to for authorization. Supports: Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Reddit, Pinterest, Telegram.

redirect_url.description: OAuth redirect URL after authorization completes

platform_metadata.description: Platform-specific metadata (e.g., subreddit for Reddit, chatId for Telegram)

credential_data.description: For API-key platforms like Telegram: { botToken: '...' }

tools.name: disconnect_account
tools.description: Disconnect a social media account. The account will be marked as inactive.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List available Facebook Pages and Instagram Business accounts for a connected Facebook/Instagram account. Used after OAuth to let the user pick which page or Instagram account to use.

id.description: Social account ID (must be a Facebook or Instagram account in needs_selection status)

tools.name: select_page
tools.description: Finalize a Facebook or Instagram connection by selecting which Page or Instagram Business account to post to.

page_id.description: Facebook Page ID to select (for Facebook accounts)

instagram_account_id.description: Instagram Business account ID to select (for Instagram accounts)

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create and publish a post to one or more connected social media platforms simultaneously. Supports text, images, videos, and links. To schedule a post for later, set scheduled_for to an ISO 8601 timestamp and optionally timezone (e.g., 'America/New_York'). Platform-specific overrides allow customizing content per platform (e.g., Reddit title, YouTube description, TikTok privacy).

media_urls.description: Media attachments — array of objects with url, type (image/video), and optional alt_text

url.description: Public URL of the media file

link_url.description: External link to include in the post

account_ids.description: Array of connected account IDs to publish to (at least 1 required)

scheduled_for.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule the post for future publishing (e.g., '2025-12-25T10:00:00Z'). If omitted, the post is published immediately.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Defaults to UTC if omitted. Only used when scheduled_for is set.

platform_overrides.description: Per-platform overrides keyed by platform name. Only include platforms you want to customize. Available fields per platform: youtube: {title, description, tags (array), privacyStatus (public/unlisted/private), categoryId (default 22=People & Blogs)}. reddit: {title, subreddit, text, nsfw}. pinterest: {title, description, board_id}. tiktok: {title, text, privacyLevel}. linkedin: {text, visibility}. facebook: {text, title (video only)}. twitter: {text}. instagram: {text}. telegram: {text, chatId, parseMode}. All fields are optional — omitted fields fall back to the main post text.

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List published social posts with filtering and pagination. Returns post content, status, and per-platform results.

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a specific post with full per-platform results including platform post URLs, statuses, and errors.

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Update a post's text and sync changes to platforms that support editing (Facebook, YouTube, Telegram). Other platforms will be skipped.

tools.name: delete_post
tools.description: Delete a post record and attempt to remove it from platforms that support deletion (Facebook, YouTube, Pinterest, Telegram). Other platforms' posts will remain live.

tools.name: reschedule_post
tools.description: Reschedule a previously scheduled post to a new date/time. The post must be in 'scheduled' status. Updates the scheduled job and post record.

scheduled_for.description: New ISO 8601 timestamp for the post (e.g., '2025-12-25T10:00:00Z')

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time (e.g., 'America/New_York'). Defaults to UTC if omitted.

tools.name: cancel_scheduled_post
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post. The post must be in 'scheduled' status. The post will be moved back to 'draft' status and the scheduled job will be removed.

tools.name: get_post_analytics
tools.description: Fetch analytics and engagement metrics for a published post across all platforms. Returns impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares, views, saves, and clicks where available. Supported: Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest. No analytics API: Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, Telegram.

id.description: Post ID to get analytics for

tools.name: account_health
tools.description: Check the connection health of one or all connected social accounts. Verifies that OAuth tokens are still valid by calling each platform's profile API. Pass a specific account ID or 'all' to check all active accounts.

id.description: Account ID to check, or 'all' to check all active accounts

tools.name: list_inbox
tools.description: List social inbox items — comments, replies, and DMs received on your connected accounts. Filter by platform, account, status, or type. Returns items sorted by most recent first with unread count.

type.description: Filter by item type (comment, reply to comment, or DM)

tools.name: get_inbox_comments
tools.description: Fetch live comments for a specific post directly from the platform API (Facebook/Instagram). Returns threaded comments with reply counts, like counts, and reply capability flags.

social_account_id.description: Social account ID that owns the post

platform_post_id.description: The platform-specific post ID to fetch comments for

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for next page of comments

tools.name: reply_inbox
tools.description: Reply to a comment on a social post, or send a private DM to the commenter via Messenger. Set private_reply=true to send as a DM instead of a public comment reply. Private replies use the Messenger Platform and are delivered to the commenter's inbox.

social_account_id.description: Social account ID to reply from

comment_id.description: Comment ID to reply to (for public reply or private DM to commenter)

post_id.description: Post ID for new top-level comment (if no comment_id)

inbox_item_id.description: Optional: inbox record ID to mark as replied

private_reply.description: If true, send as a private DM via Messenger instead of a public comment reply

tools.name: update_inbox
tools.description: Update the status of inbox items — mark as read, replied, or archived. Supports single item, bulk IDs, or mark-all-read for an account.

id.description: Single inbox item ID to update

ids.description: Array of inbox item IDs to bulk update

mark_all_read.description: If true, mark all items as read (optionally filtered by social_account_id)

social_account_id.description: Filter for mark_all_read — only mark items from this account

tools.name: delete_inbox_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment from a social platform (Facebook/Instagram). The comment will be removed from the platform and the inbox item marked as deleted.

social_account_id.description: Social account ID that owns the comment

inbox_item_id.description: Optional: inbox record ID to mark as deleted
